name: Bokurateki ni wa Risou no Rakugo
original_name: 僕ら的には理想の落語
overview: The 4 rakugokas frequent a café and there they observe the customers and clerk, and develop BL stories. Those stories will be acted as well as the rakugokas imagine / craft the story.

trailers.title: 「僕ら的には理想の落語」90秒でわかる！番組PV【2021年1月新番組】
